title: Bounded Prefetch, Worker Ownership, Ordering, and Backpressure · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Concurrency Budget
summary: Every map result launches a goroutine, concurrency is unbounded, jobs block after cancellation, output follows completion order, and prefetched failures poison visible state. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go concurrency budget increment in bounded cancellable Pokemon prefetch pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Set worker, queue, request, byte, and time ceilings from fair-use and resource evidence rather than input size.
Define which next-view latency benefit justifies prefetch traffic and when no prefetch should occur.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
